Philippines.headline: Orange notification for tropical cyclone ELEVEN-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 17.242 million .
Philippines.description: From 23/07/2026 to 23/07/2026, a Tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 139 km/h) ELEVEN-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: China (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 17.242 million .

Philippines.headline: Green flood alert in Philippines
Philippines.description: On 13/06/2026, a flood started in Philippines, lasting until 19/07/2026 (last update). The flood caused 2 deaths and 11246 displaced .

Philippines.headline: Drought is on going in Australia, Indonesia, Cambodia, Laos, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam
Philippines.description: The  Drought notification level is Green.
